svg.text: VIT Bhopal University · CSE0001 Digital Literacy · Rishab Jain · 25BCE10989
Digital literacy is the ability to find, evaluate, create, and communicate
information using digital technology — confidently, safely, and responsibly.
Use strong, unique passwords for every account
Never share OTP or PIN — not even with banks
Verify links before clicking — check the URL
Keep personal info off public social media
In India: UPI scams — never scan a QR code to RECEIVE money. PINs are only for SENDING.
Use your college email for sign-ups
Think long-term — employers will Google you
CSE0001 Digital Literacy · VIT Bhopal University · Student Digital Ambassador
